problem id: 34a31822
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(7) AND SHR(5)

examples:
  01011011 -> 00000000
  00101001 -> 00000000
  00110110 -> 00000001
  01011001 -> 00000000
  10101010 -> 00000101
  01111101 -> 00000010
  10000100 -> 00000000
  11100101 -> 00000010
  01011110 -> 00000010
  01111010 -> 00000001

query: 11000000
predicted answer: 00000000
